description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Embedded build that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for RaspberryPi64 and another for other platforms. The RaspberryPi64 job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with an archlinux container, installs dependencies, checks out the code, builds and deploys the project, and uploads the build artifact. The workflow also creates a release with the uploaded artifact.
